# DRENCH

> DRENCH — a cinematic storefront concept for high-pressure water blasters. A full-bleed hero, a product grid
> of four invented models, and an interactive cart with an illustrative checkout. An original, fictional
> concept; no real product, price, or transaction.

## Pages
- [DRENCH](https://magosp.github.io/studio-showcase/drench/): pressure-rated water blasters — shop the range (Torrent X1, Deluge Pro,
  Riptide Mini, Monsoon Max).
